chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. S–1475 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge D/O Matter For order on CMA No.3578/2025. 02.06.2025 Mr. Khalid Saifullah Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Ahmed Hussain Jokhio, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. Inspector Muhammad Yousuf Abro, SHO PS Gharo Thatta. Inspector Saindino Buriro. ------------------------------- Through this CMA No.3578/2025, the petitioner seeks initiation of contempt proceedings against the respondents as they have failed to comply with the directions passed by this Court in earlier order dated 26.12.2024 and 24.03.2025. The alleged contemnor appeared before this Court in person and they have filed undertaking which is taken on record. They submit that they will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will not cause any harassment to the petitioners and they will provide protection to the petitioners as and when they will approach to the police stations. In view of the above, this CMA stands disposed of. J U D G E Asif
